untranslatable_reason: Signal requires real-time interest rate data and cost-of-carry calculations (rate × notional) which are not available in the allowed indicator list. The allowed indicators are purely price-action and technical-analysis based (RSI, MACD, moving averages, ATR, etc.) and do not include macroeconomic data feeds or derivative pricing inputs. Translation requires: (1) interest rate time series and percentile calculations, (2) carrying cost computation in basis points, (3) instrument notional values, and (4) option vs. outright position comparison logic—none of which can be expressed with the provided indicators.
translation_notes: This is a regime-switching rule based on macroeconomic carry costs and interest rate regimes, not technical patterns. It fundamentally requires external data sources (central bank rates, repo rates) and quantitative derivatives pricing logic. The signal cannot be translated to a technical backtest rule using only price, volume, and oscillator-based indicators.
